storyOfTheWeek.title: NotebookLM introduces Cinematic Video Overviews — bespoke immersive videos from your sources
storyOfTheWeek.summary: Google NotebookLM launches Cinematic Video Overviews in NotebookLM Studio. Uses a novel combination of advanced models to create bespoke, immersive videos from user sources. Rolling out to Ultra users in English. Major evolution from audio-only overviews to full cinematic video generation.
